<noinclude>
This is the Host guest interaction template.
</noinclude>
<includeonly><tr>
<td>{{DisplayMolecule|{{{host|}}} }}</td>
<td>{{{host conc|}}}</td>
<td>{{DisplayMolecule|{{{guest|}}} }}</td>
<td>{{{guest conc|}}}</td>
<td>{{DisplayMolecule|{{{cofactor|}}} }}</td>
<td>{{{cofactor conc|}}}</td>
<td>{{{guest_host_ratio|}}}</td>
<td>{{#convertQuantity:{{{ka|}}}|property=Ka|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments }}</td>
<td>{{{logka|}}}</td>
<td>{{#convertQuantity:{{{kd|}}}|property=Kd|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments }}</td>
<td>{{#convertQuantity:{{{deltaG|}}}|property=DeltaG|form=Host_Guest_interaction_experiments }}</td>
<td property="hidden">{{{temperature|}}}</td>
<td>{{{detection_type|}}}</td>
<td>{{{assay_type|}}}</td>
<td>{{{technique|}}}</td>

<td property="hidden">{{{details|}}}</td>
<td property="hidden">{{{include|}}}</td>
<td>{{#subobject:
 |Host={{{host|}}}
 |Host concentration={{{host conc|}}}
 |Guest={{{guest|}}}
 |Guest concentration={{{guest conc|}}}
 |Cofactor={{{cofactor|}}}
 |Cofactor concentration={{{cofactor conc|}}}
 |Host guest ratio={{{guest_host_ratio|}}}
 |Ka={{{ka|}}}
 |LogKa={{{logka|}}}
 |Kd={{{kd|}}}
 |DeltaG={{{deltaG|}}}
 |TemperatureP={{{temperature|}}}
 |Detection type={{{detection_type|}}}
 |Assay type={{{assay_type|}}}
 |Technique={{{technique|}}}
 |Details={{{details|}}}
 |Included={{{include|}}}
 |BasePageName={{BASEPAGENAME}}
}}</td></tr></includeonly>
